task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Maserati Levante (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $102000.00 and wholesale is $87196.00. Product features: Luxury SUV with Italian flair and Ferrari-built engine options. Reference: https://www.maserati.com/us/en/models/levante

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Maserati Levante. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Maserati Levante. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
